items.title: From the chaos of snowboard cross, a repeat champ.
items.description: Alessandro Hämmerle of Austria came from behind to claim another gold medal in the men’s event.

items.title: Across Italy, the Winter Olympic Vibes Are Very Different
items.description: In Milan, the hub of the Winter Games, the atmosphere seems subdued, while the small towns hosting mountain events are seeing enthusiastic crowds.
